query:
SELECT
                m.id,
                m.chatroom_id,
                m.created_at,
                CAST(JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(m.content, '$.text')) AS CHAR) AS text
            FROM tachyon_apps_llms.messages m
            INNER JOIN tachyon_apps_llms.chatrooms c
                ON c.id = m.chatroom_id
            WHERE c.tenant_id = ?
              AND m.user_id = ?
              AND m.role = 'USER'
              AND m.deleted_at IS NULL
              AND JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(m.content, '$.type')) = 'text'
              AND (? IS NULL OR m.created_at >= ?)
            ORDER BY m.created_at DESC
            LIMIT ?
